_note: Captured on RTX 3090 @ $0.27/hr (Japan host, machine 48881) on 2026-05-21 via the vastai skill smoke test. Note: 2000 steps is enough to demonstrate the pipeline but not enough for the model to truly converge on Tiny Shakespeare — typical nanoGPT shakespeare_char configs need ~5000 iters to reach val_loss ~1.5. Treat this as a 'pipeline-works' baseline, not a 'tight transformer baseline.' If you want the latter, bump STEPS in train.py and re-run.
